evals.prompt: Run a full security review of the boundform project
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive report covering dependencies, SSRF, path traversal, injection, npm supply chain, with severity ratings and specific file/line references

evals.prompt: Check src/source.rs for SSRF and injection vulnerabilities — is the URL handling safe? What about cookie/header injection?
evals.expected_output: Focused analysis of source.rs covering URL scheme validation, redirect behavior, CRLF injection in cookies/headers, with specific code references

evals.prompt: Review the npm package scripts for supply chain security risks — especially the binary download mechanism
evals.expected_output: Analysis of download-binary.js covering integrity verification, HTTPS enforcement, cache poisoning, binary execution safety
